title: Director Purcari Wineries Ukraine (subsidiary of Purcari Wineries Group)

news_results.snippet: Purcari Wineries Plc is a barometer for risk sentiment in the small nation situated precariously on the edge of Russia's war against Ukraine.
news_results.title: ‘A Bet on the War’: Vineyard Exposes Risks in Front-Line Moldova

news_results.snippet: Purcari Wineries has announced about the signing of agreement of purchase and sale of 76% of shares of the Bulgarian joint-stock company Angel's Estate Winery.
news_results.title: PURCARI WINERIES ACQUIRES 76% OF ANGEL'S ESTATE, ATTRACTIVE WINE ASSET IN BULGARIA
